case_title: CACH LLC VS. ERIN E. WILLIAMS et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-08-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT UNABLE TO SERVE ERIN E WILLIAMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
